latest.title: Accelerate ARD dashboard and Building AI workflow

generatedArtifacts.notes: Generated artifacts refreshed by captured validation.

visualCheck.notes: Verified one canonical ARD operator console, readable timeline, Changes by ARD not falsely marked pushed by browser fixture branch, exact confirmation disables push, AI provider/model/mode fields visible, dangerous finding deduped and visible, planned features labeled planned/future, advanced/raw details collapsed, and no browser console errors.

remainingLimitations: Browser/local ARD pipeline remains deterministic local proof, not live external web research.
Protection AI remains static metadata/declarative review, not antivirus-grade scanning.
Changes by ARD prepares/pushes only protected branch work and still requires manual review before any merge.
latest.nextRecommendedImprovement: Improve the Changes by ARD review queue with clearer per-candidate evidence and validation proof next to each branch action.
